title: Campaign
description: A named, time-bounded content sequence that claims matching calendar slots during its window and overrides their default theme (§8.7). A campaign claims a slot when today is within [start_date, end_date], the slot's brand and platform match, and the slot_id matches slot_pattern. On conflict, the campaign with the earliest start_date wins. No out-of-calendar publishing. Spec ref: release-spec.md §6.5, §8.7.

schema_version.description: Campaign shape version, for migration handling (§11.1).

end_date.description: Campaign window end (inclusive), ISO 8601 date. MUST be on or after start_date.

brands.description: Brand ids the campaign applies to.

platforms.description: Platform descriptor ids the campaign applies to.

slot_pattern.description: Glob (supports '*') matched against slot_id to select which calendar slots the campaign claims. E.g. 'acme-*' for all of a brand's slots, 'acme-tue-*' for Tuesdays, 'acme-tue-01' for an exact match.

messaging_goals.description: Per-day theme/messaging that replaces the slot's default pillar theme for that date. Keyed by ISO date; the value is the theme text injected as the slot's THEME (pre-seed input to the brief).

examples.2099-01-01: Launch announcement: name the offer in plain language; no hype.

voice_notes.description: Optional campaign-specific voice/tone notes that override defaults during the window.

assets.description: Optional CONTENT_HOME-relative library references the campaign should reuse/modify.

success_signals.description: Optional free text describing what to watch for in post-campaign analytics.

state.description: active means the campaign claims slots during its window; draft means it is parked until ready to fire.

claim_percentage.description: Documented, NOT enforced in v1: intended fraction (1-100) of matching slots claimed per day, leaving the rest to default rotation. v1 behavior: every match is claimed regardless of this value.

priority.description: Documented, NOT enforced in v1: conflict-resolution hint when multiple campaigns overlap. v1 behavior: earliest start_date wins regardless of this value.

relative_path.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative path. Absolute paths and drive letters are forbidden.
